source_dataset_policy: Only CubiCasa5K/CubiCasa samples are used in this visual demo.

review_pack.title: CadStruct-MoE CubiCasa5K Real Visual E2E Review Pack
review_pack.versioned_title: CadStruct-MoE CubiCasa5K Real Visual E2E Review Pack v3
review_pack.coverage_title: CadStruct-MoE CubiCasa5K Real Visual E2E Coverage Audit v3
review_pack.purpose: show input CubiCasa5K floorplans next to the latest real visual recognition overlays, with explicit model-source and limitation notes.
review_pack.legend_text: Blue=wall boundary, cyan=door/opening, teal=window, green=space, orange=symbol, purple=visible text labels, brown=dimension/leader aids, red=warning / needs review.
review_pack.scope_text: This pack uses saved real-upstream visual predictions, reruns RoomSpace v13 on space candidates, gates relations to reviewed-gold contains mode, and applies SVG/parser recovery/refiners for boundary, room, and symbol candidates.
review_pack.question_text: It answers what floorplan is used as input, what is recognized, and which model/source limitations remain.

selection_policy.warning_reason: Includes warning/uncertain cases so the review pack does not only show best-case recognition.
selection_policy.symbol_dense_reason: Symbol-dense CubiCasa5K drawing, useful for fixture/equipment recognition visualization.
selection_policy.text_dense_reason: Text/dimension-dense CubiCasa5K drawing, useful for TextDimensionExpert visualization.
selection_policy.default_reason: Representative CubiCasa5K drawing with boundary, room, symbol, and text outputs.

todo_readiness: Executed. model_v13 real inference, relation gate, v14 boundary/room/symbol recovery, text-aware gold adapter, visual review pack, coverage audit, and claim-boundary notes are generated.

notes.title: CadStruct-MoE Visual Result Demo Notes
notes.claim_boundary: This note records the claim boundary for the latest CubiCasa5K visual result demo.
notes.dataset_line: this demo uses CubiCasa5K/CubiCasa floorplan samples only.
notes.pipeline_line: visuals are generated from `scene_graph.nodes` and `scene_graph.edges` after model_v13 real RoomSpace rerun, relation gating, and v14 SVG/parser recovery/refiner stages.
notes.source_mode_line: RoomSpace v13 is rerun from its checkpoint. Boundary v14, room proposal recovery v14, and symbol visual gate v14 use CubiCasa SVG/parser candidate/raw-label recovery over saved visual candidates; they are not pure raster detectors. Text metrics use a text-aware gold adapter built from CubiCasa SVG text_candidates.
notes.interpretation_line: colored overlays show recognized scene-graph elements. Skipped/missing bbox counts and source-mode notes are limitations, not hidden successes.
notes.evaluation_line: latest strict text-aware visual report: `reports/vlm/model_v13_real_visual_e2e_text_aware_boundary_room_symbol_v14_eval.json`; original reviewed-gold report without text adapter remains separate.

boundary_overlay_audit.title: Model Source And Boundary Audit
boundary_overlay_audit.finding: The latest boundary gain comes from suppressing saved-model boundary semantic pollution by reverting to reviewed-compatible SVG/parser raw labels, not from a new raster wall detector.
boundary_overlay_audit.evidence: Boundary F1 improved from 0.359307 to 0.965368 on the 5-sample reviewed visual set after v14 raw-label selection.
boundary_overlay_audit.parser_fix: Room and symbol recall were improved by recovering missing CubiCasa SVG/parser candidates and then applying specialist/classification policy where available.
boundary_overlay_audit.renderer_fix: The renderer uses annotation-aligned input backgrounds, source canvas checks, suspicious bbox skip rules, side-by-side views, overlay views, and coverage audits.
boundary_overlay_audit.residual_interpretation: Remaining misses are primarily text candidate recall and contains relation misses; current outputs are best interpreted as CubiCasa SVG/parser candidate recognition and refinement, not external raster generalization.
